title: CE's Compat & More
description: Adds additional compatibility between CEMM and other mods in CE's Adventure & More
body: This mod adds a layer of compatibility between [CEMM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ces-minerals-more) and other mods in [CE's Adventure & More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ces-adventure-more). All external textures contained in this mod are owned by their respective mod creators and their works can be found in the relations tab.
